user_prompt: Hold off escalating — let me try one more reply first. Draft something more empathetic.
actual_output:
Absolutely — here’s a more empathetic draft you can send before escalating:

---

Hi [Customer Name],

I’m really sorry this has been such a frustrating experience. I understand how disappointing it is to run into this issue, especially after you’ve already spent time trying to get it resolved.

I want to make sure we do everything we can from here. Could you please try the following one more time?

1. [Step 1]  
2. [Step 2]  
3. [Step 3]  

If the issue still happens after that, please send over any error message or screenshot you’re seeing, along with the approximate time it occurred. That will help us pinpoint what’s going wrong more quickly.

I know this has taken more effort than it should have, and I appreciate your patience while we work through it with you. I’ll stay with this and make sure we get you to the right resolution.

Best,  
[Your Name / Support Team]

---

If you share the customer’s original message or issue, I can make this more specific and natural.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot followed the user's request to provide a more empathetic draft and adhered to its system instructions to be solution-oriented and empathetic.
